title: Claude's eight text capabilities at a glance

body.concept: Claude handles text tasks in eight categories: (1) Summarization — distill long content into key points; (2) Content Generation — create blog posts, emails, marketing copy; (3) Data/Entity Extraction — pull structured data from unstructured text; (4) Question Answering — power chatbots and tutors; (5) Translation — convert between languages; (6) Text Analysis & Recommendations — detect sentiment and personalize experiences; (7) Dialogue & Conversation — build context-aware interactions; (8) Code Explanation & Generation — review, generate, and explain code.
body.analogy: Think of Claude as a Swiss Army knife for text. Each blade is a different capability. You don't need separate tools — one model handles summarizing a report, extracting names from it, translating the summary, and drafting a follow-up email.
body.visual: A hub-and-spoke diagram: Claude in the center, eight spokes radiating out to icons representing each capability (scissors for summarization, pen for generation, magnifying glass for extraction, speech bubble for Q&A, globe for translation, chart for analysis, chat bubbles for dialogue, angle brackets for code).
